name: Side Pie
teaser: The plain pie has the best cheese blend of any in the city. And Bulgarini gelato is walking distance.
review: I'm a fan but I don't find myself getting out to Altadena as much as pizza options have expanded. I still think the regular plain pie (not the Margherita) has the best cheese blend of any in the city. Another plus? Nobody else has a legendary gelato place like Bulgarini in walking distance.
headsUp: A hidden gem in a city full of hidden gems.
update: Quietly one of the most consistent slices in LA.
address: 1200 N Pacific Ave, Glendale, CA 91202, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Sunday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM
